info.description: A production-ready RESTful API built with Go following Domain-Driven Design principles, featuring PostgreSQL, Redis, JWT authentication, role-based rate limiting, and OpenTelemetry tracing.
info.title: Go-Far

post.description: Authenticate user and return access/refresh tokens
Generate a new access token using a valid refresh token
Create a new car with the provided information

put.description: Update availability status for multiple cars

post.description: Create multiple cars for a user in a single request

get.description: Get a car by its ID
Get a car by its ID with owner information

post.description: Transfer a car to a new owner

get.description: Returns the health status of the service
Returns the readiness status of the service (checks dependencies)
Get a paginated list of users with optional filters

post.description: Create a new user with the provided information

get.description: Get a user by their ID
Get all cars owned by a specific user
Get the total number of cars owned by a specific user
